Class-Monk 20 — Female Human Monk: 20
Strength: 11 (+0) Dexterity: 14 (+2) Constitution: 14 (+2) Intelligence: 17 (+3) Wisdom: 15 (+2) Charisma: 11 (+0)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Chaotic Neutral Deity: NH-Rillifane Rallathil (CG)
Ability Boosts: Charisma Experience: 658959/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 70 Carry/Lift: 165/330
Ability Notes:
Human Ability Adjustment: +1 Charisma/+1 Constitution/+1 Dexterity/+1 Intelligence/+1 Strength/+1 Wisdom
Keen Mind: +1 Intelligence
Mobile: +10 Speed
Observant: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Intelligence, Wisdom)
Resilient (Intelligence): +1 Intelligence
Unarmored Movement: +30 Speed in no armor
Ability Boosts: 1 to distribute
Leap To Your Feet: Standing from prone costs only 5' movement
Unarmored Movement: Can move across vertical surfaces and liquids
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: General: 5 Selectable Feature Count: Monk (Monastic Tradition)
Feats: Keen Mind; Mobile; Mounted Combatant; Observant; Resilient (Intelligence) Human Features: Human Ability Adjustment; Language (Common; Choose 1 from any) Monk Features: Bonus Proficiencies (Way Of The Drunken Master); Deflect Missiles; Diamond Soul; Drunkard's Luck; Drunken Technique; Empty Body; Evasion; Extra Attack; Flurry Of Blows; Intoxicated Frenzy; Ki-Empowered Strikes; Ki; Martial Arts; Monastic Tradition; One With The Blade; Path Of The Kensei; Patient Defense; Perfect Self; Purity Of Body; Radiant Sun Bolt; Save Proficiency (Strength; Dexterity); Searing Arc Strike; Searing Sunburst; Sharpen The Blade; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Acrobatics, Athletics, History, Insight, Religion, Stealth); Slow Fall; Step Of The Wind; Stillness Of Mind; Stunning Strike; Sun Shield; Timeless Body (Monk); Tipsy Sway; Tongue Of The Sun And Moon; Tool Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Artisan's Tools, any Musical Instrument); Unarmored Defense; Unarmored Movement; Unerring Accuracy; Way Of The Drunken Master; Way Of The Kensei; Way Of The Sun Soul; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Shortsword) Acolyte Features: Language (Choose 2 from any); Shelter Of The Faithful; Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion)
Feature Notes:
Monastic Tradition: 1 selection
One With The Blade: Has the Magic Kensei Weapons and Deft Strike features
Path Of The Kensei: Has the Kensei Weapons, Agile Parry, Kensei's Shot, and Way Of The Brush features
Tipsy Sway: Has the Leap To Your Feet and Redirect Attack features
Drunkard's Luck: Can spend 2 ki points to cancel disadvantage on a self ability check, attack, or save
Keen Mind: Always knows the direction of north and hours until sunrise or sunset/Can recall anything seen or heard during the past month
Shelter Of The Faithful: Can receive aid from temples of NH-Rillifane Rallathil and fellow believers
Timeless Body (Monk): Suffers no debility from aging and needs no food or water
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +2 Insight: (wis) +8 Performance: (cha) +6
Animal Handling: (wis) +2 Intimidation: (cha) +0 Persuasion: (cha) +0
Arcana: (int) +3 Investigation: (int) +3 Religion: (int) +9
Athletics: (str) +6 Medicine: (wis) +2 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +2
Deception: (cha) +0 Nature: (int) +3 Stealth: (dex) +2
History: (int) +9 Perception: (wis) +2 Survival: (wis) +2
Skill Proficiency: Athletics; History; Insight; Performance; Religion
Tool Proficiency: Brewer's Supplies; Lute; Painter's Supplies
Languages: Common; Draconic; Giant; Halfling
Skill Notes:
Bonus Proficiencies (Way Of The Drunken Master): Skill Proficiency (Performance)/Tool Proficiency (Brewer's Supplies)
Way Of The Brush: Tool Proficiency (Choose 1 from Calligrapher's Supplies, Painter's Supplies)
Observant: Can read lips/+5 passive Investigation and passive Perception
Tongue Of The Sun And Moon: Can converse with any creature that understands a language
Combat
Hit Points: 121 Initiative: +2 Armor Class: 14
Weapon Proficiency: Blowgun; Handaxe; Javelin; Longbow; Mace; Shortsword; Simple Weapons
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Club (+8 1d10+2 B); Greatclub (+6 1d8 B); Unarmed Strike (+8 1d10+2 B); Unarmed
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +40
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +2
Kensei Weapons: Has proficiency in 5 choices of non-heavy melee or ranged weapons
Martial Arts: When unarmored and wielding only Monk weapons, gains +2 attack and damage with unarmed strikes and weapon attacks and raises their damage dice to 1d10
Unarmored Defense: +2 Armor Class in no armor
Agile Parry: Gains +2 Armor Class until the start of the next turn after an unarmed strike when armed with a Kensei melee weapon
Deflect Missiles: Can use a reaction to reduce suffered missile damage by 1d10+22 HP; reducing it to 0 HP allows spending 1 ki point to make an immediate attack with the missile
Deft Strike: Can spend 1 ki point to inflict +1d10 HP with a Kensei weapon once per turn
Drunken Technique: Flurry Of Blows gives the benefits of Disengage and +10 Speed until the end of the turn
Extra Attack: Can make 2 attacks during an Attack action
Flurry Of Blows: Can spend 1 ki point after using an Attack action to make 2 unarmed strikes as a bonus action
Intoxicated Frenzy: Directing each Flurry Of Blows attack at a different target allows making 3 additional attacks
Kensei's Shot: Can use a bonus action to inflict +1d4 HP weapon damage with ranged Kensei weapons until the end of the turn
Ki-Empowered Strikes: Unarmed strikes count as magical
Ki: Can use 20 ki points per short rest
Magic Kensei Weapons: Attacks with Kensei weapons count as magical
Martial Arts: Can use a bonus action to make an unarmed strike after using an Attack action with an unarmed strike or Monk weapon
Mobile: Can Dash at full speed in difficult terrain/Attacking does not provoke an opportunity attack by the target
Mounted Combatant: Has advantage on melee attacks on unmounted foes smaller than mount and can redirect attacks on mount to self
Patient Defense: Can spend 1 ki point to Dodge as a bonus action
Perfect Self: Has a minimum of 4 ki points available after initiative
Radiant Sun Bolt: R30' +8 ranged touch attack inflicts 1d10+2 HP radiant; after using it as part of an Attack action, can use a bonus action and spend 1 ki point for an additional use
Redirect Attack: Can use a reaction and spend 1 ki point to redirect a missed foe melee attack vs. self to an adjacent creature
Sharpen The Blade: Can use a bonus action and spend 1-3 ki points to gain an equal bonus on attack and damage with a nom-magical Kensei weapon for 1 min
Step Of The Wind: Can spend 1 ki point to double jump distance and to Disengage or Dash as a bonus action
Stunning Strike: Can spend 1 ki point after a successful melee attack to stun the target (save DC 16 Constitution negates) until the end of the next turn
Sun Shield: Can use a bonus action to emit or suppress a 30' bright light; while emitting light, can use a reaction to inflict 7 HP radiant on a successful melee attacker
Unerring Accuracy: Can reroll a monk weapon miss once per turn
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Constitution; Dexterity; Intelligence; Strength; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +6; Constitution: +8; Dexterity: +8; Intelligence: +9; Strength: +6; Wisdom: +8
Save Notes:
Diamond Soul: Proficient on all saves
Resilient (Intelligence): Save Proficiency (Intelligence)
Diamond Soul: Can spend 1 ki point to reroll a save
Evasion: Successful Dexterity saves yield no damage instead of half, and failures yield half damage
Mounted Combatant: Mount's successful Dexterity saves yield no damage instead of half, and failed saves yield half damage
Purity Of Body: Has immunity to disease and poison
Slow Fall: Can use a reaction to reduce falling damage by 100 HP
Stillness Of Mind: Can use an action to end a charmed or frightened effect on self
Magic
Attack: Monk: +8 Spell DC: Monk: 16
Spells:
Astral Projection (Monk9 [Empty Body] Necr): (Hour) R10' Self and 8 willing targets project to the Astral Plane
Burning Hands (Monk1 [Searing Arc Strike] Evoc): (Action) 15' cone inflicts 3d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and lights unattended flammable objects (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Magic Notes:
Empty Body: Can spend 4 ki points to become invisible and gain resistance to all damage other than force for 1 min/Can spend 8 ki points to cast Astral Projection on self
Searing Arc Strike: Can use a bonus action and spend 2 ki points to cast Burning Hands after using an Attack action; each additional ki point spent raises the spell level by 1, to a maximum of level 9
Searing Sunburst: R150' 20' radius inflicts 2d6 HP radiant (save DC 16 Constitution negates); can spend 1, 2, or 3 ki points to inflict +2d6, +4d6, or +6d6 HP
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 1 available vs. 3 allocated
